title: Your request to unsubscribe to MedEffect e-Notice has been submitted. - Canada.ca
content:
## Your request to unsubscribe to MedEffect e-Notice has been submitted.
If you continue to receive the MedEffect e-Notice after 24 hours, there might be a problem with the e-mail address that you provided (e.g. a spelling mistake, etc.). You may resubmit your e-mail on the Unsubscribe Form or contact the Health Product InfoWatch Team .
